message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for __pycache__/, *.pyc, .tmp/, target_sym*/,
.fastembed_cache/, and .agent-mail.yaml to prevent Python cache
files, temporary directories, symlinked build targets, ML model
caches, and agent coordination config from being tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,3 +35,19 @@ a.out
 
 # bv graph output
 --graph-format.svg
+
+# Python cache
+__pycache__/
+*.pyc
+
+# Temporary directories
+.tmp/
+
+# Symlinked target directories
+target_sym*/
+
+# FastEmbed model caches (downloaded at runtime)
+.fastembed_cache/
+
+# Agent coordination config
+.agent-mail.yaml
